failure_scenarios.name: api_pod_restart
failure_scenarios.evidence: kubectl rollout restart deploy/spaceops-api; rollout status succeeded; smoke and Scenario A/B passed after recovery.

failure_scenarios.name: agent_worker_restart
failure_scenarios.evidence: No deploy/pod with app.kubernetes.io/component=agent-worker exists in this Variant B stage profile.

failure_scenarios.name: opa_unavailable
failure_scenarios.evidence: Scaled spaceops-opa to 0; no OPA pods remained; Scenario A/B completed with controlled escalation; OPA restored to 1/1.

failure_scenarios.name: postgres_restart
failure_scenarios.evidence: kubectl rollout restart statefulset/spaceops-postgres; rollout status succeeded; smoke and Scenario A/B passed after recovery.

failure_scenarios.name: queue_dlq_pressure
failure_scenarios.evidence: 5/5 burst runs passed; /dlq/telemetry returned count=0; Prometheus up query returned 1 for api, nats, otel, and postgres.

failure_scenarios.name: llm_backend_failure
failure_scenarios.evidence: Temporarily set OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9; Scenario A returned HTTP 200 with escalation; API logs recorded LLMGatewayProviderError and backend_actual=unserved.

failure_scenarios.name: budget_exhaustion
failure_scenarios.evidence: Temporarily set LLM_DAILY_TOKEN_BUDGET=1; second Scenario A returned HTTP 200 with escalation; API logs recorded LLMBudgetExceededError. No backend fallback was used.

observability.prometheus_targets: all up: spaceops-api, spaceops-nats, spaceops-otel-collector, spaceops-postgres

notes: F2 is not applicable until Variant A agent-worker is enabled on stage.
F7 PromQL did not retain a budget_exceeded vector in the queried window; API logs provide the evidence for LLMBudgetExceededError.
